docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-08-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $92.62 FILED BY SOFTWARE CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT MICRO UNITED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
UNABLE TO SERVE MICROUNITED FOR 9-8-92 HRG.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MICRO UNITED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOFTWARE CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICRO UNITED $92.62 PRINCIPAL, $10.63 INTEREST, $49.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $152.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MICRO UNITED
